mapper.select:
select id, requirement_name as requirementName, module_name as moduleName, requirement_content as requirementContent, precondition_desc as preconditionDesc, expected_desc as expectedDesc, remark, creator_id as creatorId, creator_role as creatorRole, manager_id as managerId, create_time as createTime from requirement_spec
and requirement_name like concat('%', #{requirementName}, '%')
and module_name like concat('%', #{moduleName}, '%')
and ( (creator_role = 'ADMIN' and creator_id = #{currentUserId}) or (creator_role = 'USER' and manager_id = #{currentUserId}) )
and ( creator_role = 'USER' and creator_id = #{currentUserId} )
order by id desc

select id, requirement_name as requirementName, module_name as moduleName, requirement_content as requirementContent, precondition_desc as preconditionDesc, expected_desc as expectedDesc, remark, creator_id as creatorId, creator_role as creatorRole, manager_id as managerId, create_time as createTime from requirement_spec where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into requirement_spec (requirement_name, module_name, requirement_content, precondition_desc, expected_desc, remark, creator_id, creator_role, manager_id) values (#{requirementName}, #{moduleName}, #{requirementContent}, #{preconditionDesc}, #{expectedDesc}, #{remark}, #{creatorId}, #{creatorRole}, #{managerId})
mapper.update: update requirement_spec set requirement_name = #{requirementName}, module_name = #{moduleName}, requirement_content = #{requirementContent}, precondition_desc = #{preconditionDesc}, expected_desc = #{expectedDesc}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
